nasb.text: How you have fallen from heaven, O star of the morning, son of the dawn! You have been cut down to the earth, You who have weakened the nations!

esv.text: “How you are fallen from heaven, O Day Star, son of Dawn! How you are cut down to the ground, you who laid the nations low!

cnv.text: 明亮之星、清晨之子啊！ 你怎麼從天上墜落？ 你這傾覆列國的， 怎麼被砍倒在地上？

ccb.text: “明亮的晨星、黎明之子啊， 你怎么从天上坠落下来？ 你这打败列国的怎么被砍倒在地上？

csbs.text: “明亮的晨星，黎明之子啊， 你怎么会从天坠落呢？ 你这击败列国的， 怎么会被砍倒在地呢？
